objects.name: Analytic 1752
objects.description: Defender correlates a custom keyboard extension activation (optionally with TCC ‘Full Access’) or abnormal UI text-entry interception with local keylog persistence and/or small egress. Chain: capability/consent (keyboard Full Access/TCC) → intercept (keyboard commit events or repeated secure text entry edits) → persist to container → near-term egress.

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: iOS:unifiedlog
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Keyboard extension Full Access change or related privacy grant for <bundle_id>

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: iOS:unifiedlog
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Secure text entry focus and editingChanged bursts not typical for the app

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: iOS:unifiedlog
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: CREATE/WRITE of keylog artifacts (keys_*.txt, inputs.db) within app/keyboard container

x_mitre_mutable_elements.description: Minimum keyboard commit or editingChanged events (e.g., ≥10).
Require Full Access to elevate severity (true/false).
Regex for keylog artifacts under container paths.
Foreground state, Focus modes, MDM policy.
